input.command: tmux show-options -g | rg 'xterm-keys|default-terminal|terminal-features|extended-keys' ; tmux info | rg 'extended-keys|RGB|Tc|xterm-kitty|Ms'
input.description: Shows tmux key and terminal settings

input.command: tmux display-message -p 'version=#{version} term=#{client_termname} features=#{client_termfeatures}' && tmux show-options -gsv xterm-keys && tmux show-options -gsv extended-keys && tmux show-options -gsv default-terminal && tmux show-options -gsv terminal-features
input.description: Shows tmux version and key options
